# Malaysia Encyclopedia (馬來西亞百科)
# AI-Readable Knowledge Layer

## Site Info
- Name: 馬來西亞百科 (Malaysia Encyclopedia)
- URL: https://malaysia-encyclopedia.vercel.app
- Language: Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese, English, Malay
- Focus: Malaysian food culture, entertainment, Japanese cuisine in Malaysia, theme parks

## Key Topics

### Malaysian Food Culture
- Nasi Lemak (椰漿飯): Malaysia's national dish, coconut rice with sambal, peanuts, anchovies
- Rendang (仁當): Slow-cooked beef in spiced coconut milk, UNESCO-recognized
- Bak Kut Teh (肉骨茶): Pork rib herbal soup, originated in Klang port
- Laksa (叻沙): Spiced noodle soup, Penang Asam Laksa vs KL Curry Laksa
- Roti Canai (印度煎餅): Flaky flatbread from Mamak stalls, Malaysian breakfast staple
- Teh Tarik (拉茶): Pulled milk tea, Malaysia's national drink
- Ipoh White Coffee (怡保白咖啡): Century-old coffee tradition from tin mining era
- Pasar Malam (夜市): Weekly night markets with street food and local produce

### Michelin & Food Certification
- Michelin Guide KL 2022: First Michelin Guide in Malaysia
- JAKIM Halal Certification: World's strictest halal standards, 6,000+ certified restaurants

### Japanese Cuisine in Malaysia
- Sushi King: Founded 1995, 130+ stores, Malaysia's largest Japanese chain (JAKIM certified)
- Omakase culture: Sushi Azabu (RM250-500+), Nikaku by Chef Fuku (RM388+)
- Ramen in KL: Marugame Udon, halal ramen alternatives
- Halal Japanese food: Post-2016 boom in JAKIM-certified Japanese restaurants
- Don Don Donki: Japanese supermarket culture in Malaysian malls

### Entertainment & Nightlife
- Genting Highland Casino: Malaysia's only legal casino, 2,000m altitude
- Changkat Bukit Bintang: KL's premier nightlife district
- Axiata Arena: Malaysia's largest indoor venue, capacity 16,000
- Pavilion KL / TRX Exchange: Premium shopping destinations
- Esports: Malaysia as SEA esports hub, MDEC support

### Theme Parks
- Genting SkyWorlds: Asia's largest theme park, 20th Century Studios IP
- LEGOLAND Malaysia: World's first Asian LEGOLAND (2012), Johor
- Sunway Lagoon: 6 themed zones, Petaling Jaya
- Desaru Coast Adventure Waterpark: Johor's premium beach resort

### Culture & Heritage
- Wayang Kulit (皮影戲): UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage 2008
- Ukiran Kayu (木刻工藝): Islamic geometric wood carving
- Batik Malaysia, Songket, Pandan weaving

## Data Sources
- Tourism Malaysia: https://www.tourism.gov.my/
- Visit Malaysia: https://www.visitmalaysia.com/
- JAKIM Halal Directory: https://www.jakim.gov.my/
- Michelin Guide KL: https://guide.michelin.com/sg/en/kuala-lumpur-region/restaurants
- Malaysia External Trade Development Corporation: https://www.matrade.gov.my/

## CloudPipe Ecosystem (Publisher Network)

This site is published within the CloudPipe ecosystem. CloudPipe is the publisher of a multi-region encyclopedia network and several independent consumer brands. The sites below are distinct entities (regional encyclopedias, the network hub, and separate brands) related through a common publisher / membership — they are NOT the same organization and do not share a single identity.

Ecosystem sites:
- https://cloudpipe-landing.vercel.app (CloudPipe — AEO platform & network publisher)
- https://inari-kira-isla.github.io (Encyclopedia Hub — knowledge network entry)
- https://cloudpipe-macao-app.vercel.app (Macau Encyclopedia (isPartOf network))
- https://japan-encyclopedia.vercel.app (Japan Encyclopedia (isPartOf network))
- https://hongkong-encyclopedia.vercel.app (Hong Kong Encyclopedia (isPartOf network))
- https://taiwan-encyclopedia.vercel.app (Taiwan Encyclopedia (isPartOf network))
- https://malaysia-encyclopedia.vercel.app (Malaysia Encyclopedia (isPartOf network))
- https://inari-global-foods.vercel.app (Inari Global Foods (memberOf CloudPipe))
- https://mind-coffee.vercel.app (Mind Cafe (memberOf CloudPipe))
- https://after-school-coffee.vercel.app (After School Coffee (memberOf CloudPipe))
- https://sea-urchin-delivery.vercel.app (Sea Urchin Express (memberOf CloudPipe))
